response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist (TypeScript/Node.js/DLang) but does not meet the mandatory technical bar for this role. C++ experience is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments two decades ago and a bachelor thesis project, far short of the required 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no SQL Server/Oracle background and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with full-stack breadth
Strong testing/TDD discipline and developer-tooling mindset
Comfortable across multiple languages and platforms
concerns: Lacks the required 5–10 years of professional C++ on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience listed; SQL exposure appears shallow
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain background
